title: slovakian shrimp tagliere
description: charred, crumbly slovakian dish featuring shrimp-paste-kapi, agemono-deep-fry, ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together shrimp, kapi paste, flour, eggs, allspice, garlic powder, and salt.
Heat 1/4 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the shrimp mixture into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried shrimp from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1/4 cup of vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese to the skillet and stir until melted and smooth.
Return the fried shrimp to the skillet and stir to coat with the cheese sauce.
Transfer the shrimp tagliere to a serving platter or individual plates.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or chives if desired.
